WITH filtered_data AS (
    SELECT 
        ym.CustomerID,
        ym.Date,
        c.Segment,
        ym.Consumption
    FROM 
        yearmonth ym
    JOIN 
        customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE 
        ym.Date BETWEEN '2012' AND '2013'
),
total_consumption AS (
    SELECT 
        Segment,
        SUM(CASE WHEN Date LIKE '2012%' THEN Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS consumption_2012,
        SUM(CASE WHEN Date LIKE '2013%' THEN Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS consumption_2013
    FROM 
        filtered_data
    GROUP BY 
        Segment
)
SELECT 
    Segment,
    ((consumption_2013 - consumption_2012) / consumption_2013) * 100 AS percentage_increase
FROM 
    total_consumption
ORDER BY 
    ABS(percentage_increase) DESC;

RankedDistricts AS (
    SELECT district_id, avg_salary, min_birth_date,
           RANK() OVER (ORDER BY min_birth_date DESC) AS rank_by_age,
